name: Creole Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 1 tbsp vegetable oil in a saucepan.
2. Heat the oil over moderate heat.
3. Add chopped onions and thinly sliced celery to the pan. Cook and stir until the onions are soft but not browned.
4. Gradually add flour, stirring until it is fully absorbed by the vegetables.
5. Stir in 1 cup of tomato juice and 1/4 tsp salt (optional). Continue cooking until the mixture is slightly thickened and smooth.
6. Drain the green beans well.
7. Add the drained green beans to the hot sauce and simmer for 2 minutes.
8. Serve hot, using 1/2 cup per serving. Note: 1 serving contains approximately 8 calories.
